creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Kondratyev from comment #11)
> Try updated patch. It forbids entering 2 finger scroll mode when any button is pressed

Hi Vladimir,
Thanks for that - it works very nicely! It works as long as I click before touching my other finger to the touchpad. However, if I happen to have my other finger already resting on the touchpad then it still doesn't work, and sometimes tries to scroll. Is it possible to make the click take precedence and cancel any current multitouch action?
